testcase.name: test_admin_login_invalid_creds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_celebrate_pillars_5changes.py:57: in test_admin_login_invalid_creds assert resp.status_code == 401 E assert 502 == 401 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_feast_item_concierge_request

failure.message:
AssertionError: Concierge request failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_celebrate_pillars_5changes.py:76: in test_feast_item_concierge_request assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Concierge request failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Concierge request failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
